codes.meaning: A lesson block contains active HTML, script, executable, or macro content.
An assessment answer is not classified as protected.
The requested artifact is not declared by the contract release.
A requested artifact path escapes its contract release.
A published contract release failed checksum or manifest verification.
The requested contract release is not published.
A citation does not resolve to a declared repository document.
A typed identifier does not resolve to a declared target.
An architecture relationship endpoint is not declared.
A code reference points to an undeclared repository.
A stable identifier is duplicated in the package.
Package content is absent.
A source path is absolute or traverses outside its repository root.
The maximum assessment attempts are outside the supported range.
A duration or time limit is outside the supported range.
A stable identifier is not normalized lowercase kebab case.
Content cannot be deserialized as the versioned package contract.
An ordering value is outside the supported range.
A grading points value is outside the supported range.
A source line range is invalid.
Assessment item selection is empty or outside the supported range.
An assessment threshold is outside zero through 100 percent.
A date and time value is not represented as RFC 3339 UTC with a Z suffix.
A required contract value is absent.
A code reference branch or commit does not match its declared source snapshot.
A source repository has no revision, branch, or commit identity.
A lesson block refers to a remote resource that is not declared by an approved extension.
The assessment purpose is not supported.
The lesson block type is not allow-listed.
The callout tone is not allow-listed.
A supplied source excerpt has no supported content classification.
Evidence confidence is not one of the supported explicit states.
The learning difficulty is not supported.
A citation does not declare direct evidence, synthesis, or interpretation.
The assessment feedback-release policy is not supported.
The assessment item type is not supported.
A code reference language is not allow-listed.
The package locale is outside the supported locale catalog.
The architecture relationship type is not supported.
The assessment selection mode is not supported.
The package contract version is outside the supported version window.
